title: [Feature] Mooncake connectot support dsv4
user facing impact/summary: Mooncake connector now works for DeepSeek V4 and hybrid KV cache disaggregated prefill scenarios.
reason: Core user-facing feature for PD and hybrid KV cache deployments.

title: [Feature] WeightTransfer: Add HCCLWeightTransferEngine backend for Ascend NPU
user facing impact/summary: Adds an Ascend-native HCCL weight-transfer backend for RL and training-inference synchronization.
reason: Major capability addition with direct workload impact.

title: [Ascend950][Feature] Add support for W8A8FP8 dynamic quantization on Ascend950
user facing impact/summary: Expands Ascend 950 quantization support for production deployments.

title: [Feature] Support Ascend 950 CPU binding
user facing impact/summary: Adds CPU binding support tailored for Ascend 950 / A5 server topology.
reason: Useful operational feature for a new hardware platform.

title: [Feature] SSD support multiple DP in each machine
user facing impact/summary: Fixes SSD offload directory conflicts when multiple DP ranks share one machine.

title: [Performance] Optimize split_qkv_tp_rmsnorm_rope with grid stride andh loading
user facing impact/summary: Reports about a 5x kernel speedup on the tested prefill workload.
reason: Clear performance gain with benchmark data.

title: [Attention] [BugFix]Enable multistream_dsv4_dsa_overlap and remove redundant code
user facing impact/summary: Improves DSA overlap behavior and removes redundant code paths in DSA v1.
reason: Relevant for DeepSeek V4 performance and stability.

title: [Doc] add GLM5.2 documents
user facing impact/summary: Adds GLM5.2 documentation for users adopting the new release.

title: [CI] Add vllm-ascend tag for image and wheel build
user facing impact/summary: Allows release workflows to publish v0.22.1rc1 artifacts.
reason: Important for release execution, though not a runtime feature.

title: [CI] Fix /e2e command
user facing impact/summary: Improves CI and release workflow reliability.
reason: Operational improvement worth a brief mention.
